title: Verify beneficiary/local use + reuse events
context: open-map-gaps measures success by outcomes, not outputs: a pack that nobody uses, or edits that get reverted, count as zero. The M3 milestone requires at least one externally verifiable beneficiary use event — a partner actually using the completed map for a real decision. Self-reported impact does not count; evidence must be an OSM changeset history, a validator's sign-off record, a partner's written confirmation, or a Tasking Manager project completion. This task documents that evidence and records it in the outcome ledger.
objective: Research, document, and commit at least one externally verifiable beneficiary/local use event and update the outcome ledger with validated-feature counts, pass rates, reverts-for-cause, and root-cause fixes.
acceptanceCriteria: At least one externally verifiable use event is recorded: a partner used the completed map for a real decision; evidence is a written confirmation, report, or TM project completion.
Validated-feature counts, pass rate, and reverts are recorded in the outcome ledger; reverts-for-cause have a logged root-cause and gate/tooling fix.
Outcome ledger is committed and reviewed by the Steward.
Self-reported impact is explicitly excluded; only externally verifiable evidence counts.
resources: PLAN.md — Success metrics; Outcome capture section
HOT Tasking Manager project completion records — https://tasks.hotosm.org
output: A committed outcome ledger update recording at least one verified beneficiary use event with externally verifiable evidence, plus validated-feature counts, pass rate, revert counts, and root-cause notes for any reverts-for-cause.
